changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Seed the first blood and urine order catalog. IDs match the frontend lims-lab-workflow.js reference catalog so Orders & Billing can create real backend orders while still showing rich static workflow metadata.
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO test_catalog (id, test_code, test_name, category, price, sample_type, tube_type, is_active, turn_around_time_hours, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted, version) VALUES ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111001', 'FBC', 'Full Blood Count', 'Hematology', 1200.00, 'Whole blood', 'EDTA_PURPLE', true, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111002', 'ESR', 'Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate', 'Hematology', 900.00, 'Citrated blood', 'CITRATE_BLUE', true, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111003', 'CRP', 'C-Reactive Protein', 'Biochemistry', 2200.00, 'Serum', 'SST_GOLD', true, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111004', 'GLU', 'Blood Glucose', 'Biochemistry', 900.00, 'Serum or plasma', 'SST_GOLD', true, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111005', 'HBA1C', 'HbA1c', 'Biochemistry', 2600.00, 'Whole blood', 'EDTA_PURPLE', true, 8, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111006', 'LIPID', 'Lipid Profile', 'Biochemistry', 3200.00, 'Serum', 'SST_GOLD', true, 8, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111007', 'UREA', 'Blood Urea', 'Biochemistry', 1100.00, 'Serum', 'SST_GOLD', true, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111008', 'CREA', 'Serum Creatinine', 'Biochemistry', 1200.00, 'Serum', 'SST_GOLD', true, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111009', 'UA', 'Uric Acid', 'Biochemistry', 1300.00, 'Serum', 'SST_GOLD', true, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111010', 'ELECT', 'Serum Electrolytes', 'Biochemistry', 2400.00, 'Plasma or serum', 'HEPARIN_GREEN', true, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111011', 'LFT', 'Liver Function Test', 'Biochemistry', 3500.00, 'Serum', 'SST_GOLD', true, 8, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111012', 'UFR', 'Urine Full Report', 'Urinalysis', 900.00, 'Clean-catch midstream urine', 'URINE_YELLOW', true, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111013', 'UMA', 'Urine Microalbumin', 'Urinalysis', 2200.00, 'Random urine', 'URINE_YELLOW', true, 8, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111014', 'UCREA', 'Urine Creatinine', 'Urinalysis', 1200.00, 'Random urine', 'URINE_YELLOW', true, 8, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0), ('11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111015', 'UHCG', 'Urine hCG Pregnancy Test', 'Urinalysis', 1400.00, 'Random urine', 'URINE_YELLOW', true, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', 'system', false, 0) ON CONFLICT (test_code) DO UPDATE SET test_name = EXCLUDED.test_name, category = EXCLUDED.category, price = EXCLUDED.price, sample_type = EXCLUDED.sample_type, tube_type = EXCLUDED.tube_type, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, turn_around_time_hours = EXCLUDED.turn_around_time_hours, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = 'system', is_deleted = false;
INSERT INTO test_parameters (id, test_id, name, unit, ref_low, ref_high, display_order, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, is_deleted, version) VALUES ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111001', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'WBC', '10^9/L', 4.00, 11.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111002', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'RBC', '10^12/L', 3.80, 5.80, 2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111003', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'Hemoglobin', 'g/dL', 11.50, 17.50, 3, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111004', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'Hematocrit', '%', 35.00, 52.00, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111005', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'MCV', 'fL', 80.00, 100.00, 5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111006', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'MCH', 'pg', 27.00, 33.00, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111007', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'MCHC', 'g/dL', 32.00, 36.00, 7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111008', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'Platelets', '10^9/L', 150.00, 450.00, 8, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111009', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'Neutrophils', '%', 40.00, 75.00, 9, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111010', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'FBC'), 'Lymphocytes', '%', 20.00, 45.00, 10, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0),
('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111011', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'ESR'), 'ESR', 'mm/hr', 0.00, 20.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111012', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'CRP'), 'CRP', 'mg/L', 0.00, 5.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111013', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'GLU'), 'Glucose', 'mg/dL', 70.00, 110.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111014', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'HBA1C'), 'HbA1c', '%', 4.00, 5.60, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0),
('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111015', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LIPID'), 'Total Cholesterol', 'mg/dL', 0.00, 200.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111016', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LIPID'), 'Triglycerides', 'mg/dL', 0.00, 150.00, 2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111017', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LIPID'), 'HDL Cholesterol', 'mg/dL', 40.00, NULL, 3, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111018', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LIPID'), 'LDL Cholesterol', 'mg/dL', 0.00, 130.00, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111019', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LIPID'), 'VLDL Cholesterol', 'mg/dL', 5.00, 40.00, 5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0),
('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111020', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UREA'), 'Urea', 'mg/dL', 15.00, 45.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111021', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'CREA'), 'Creatinine', 'mg/dL', 0.60, 1.30, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111022', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UA'), 'Uric Acid', 'mg/dL', 3.50, 7.20, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0),
('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111023', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'ELECT'), 'Sodium', 'mmol/L', 135.00, 145.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111024', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'ELECT'), 'Potassium', 'mmol/L', 3.50, 5.10, 2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111025', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'ELECT'), 'Chloride', 'mmol/L', 98.00, 107.00, 3, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0),
('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111026', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LFT'), 'Total Bilirubin', 'mg/dL', 0.10, 1.20, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111027', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LFT'), 'Direct Bilirubin', 'mg/dL', 0.00, 0.30, 2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111028', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LFT'), 'ALT', 'U/L', 0.00, 45.00, 3, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111029', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LFT'), 'AST', 'U/L', 0.00, 45.00, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111030', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LFT'), 'ALP', 'U/L', 40.00, 130.00, 5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111031', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LFT'), 'Albumin', 'g/dL', 3.50, 5.20, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111032', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'LFT'), 'Total Protein', 'g/dL', 6.00, 8.30, 7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0),
('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111033', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Colour', NULL, NULL, NULL, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111034', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Appearance', NULL, NULL, NULL, 2, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111035', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Specific Gravity', NULL, 1.01, 1.03, 3, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111036', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'pH', NULL, 5.00, 8.00, 4, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111037', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Protein', NULL, NULL, NULL, 5, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111038', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Glucose', NULL, NULL, NULL, 6, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111039', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Ketones', NULL, NULL, NULL, 7, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111040', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Blood', NULL, NULL, NULL, 8, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111041', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Nitrite', NULL, NULL, NULL, 9, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111042', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'Leukocyte Esterase', NULL, NULL, NULL, 10, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111043', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'WBC', 'cells/hpf', 0.00, 5.00, 11, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111044', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UFR'), 'RBC', 'cells/hpf', 0.00, 2.00, 12, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0),
('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111045', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UMA'), 'Microalbumin', 'mg/L', 0.00, 30.00, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111046', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UCREA'), 'Urine Creatinine', 'mg/dL', NULL, NULL, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0), ('21111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111047', (SELECT id FROM test_catalog WHERE test_code = 'UHCG'), 'hCG', NULL, NULL, NULL, 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', false, 0) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET test_id = EXCLUDED.test_id, name = EXCLUDED.name, unit = EXCLUDED.unit, ref_low = EXCLUDED.ref_low, ref_high = EXCLUDED.ref_high, display_order = EXCLUDED.display_order, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = 'system', is_deleted = false;
